source_schema: schemas/1dotRefAND3.json (used verbatim -- upstream already ships a compiled ShExJ schema, no ShExC translation needed)
comment: 1dotRefAND3_passShape1Shape2Shape3: on { <n1> <p1> <n2> . <n2> <p2> "X" . <n2> <p3> "X" . <n2> <p4> "X" } -- n2 satisfies all three ANDed shape references (S2, S3, S4 each require a distinct predicate, and n2 has all three), so the ShapeAnd conforms; the positive counterpart to 1dotRefAND3_failAll.
